creator: kargl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 232459
Diff to build OpenMPI with Fortran 2008 support

Fortran 2008 has been around since, well, 2008.  It has actually been superseded by Fortran 2018, and Fortran 2023 is on the horizon.  Building OpenMPI with modern Fortran seems to be a good idea.
